$comment: Merge-blocking floors per model. minPassK ratchets UP from a real live run's measured pass^k; it is never a number nobody measured. maxSilentCorruptions is hard-zero for every model. minTasks is the required task coverage (v0 suite = 12). k is the trials-per-task the floor is defined at. claude-opus-4-8 is set to 0.9 from a measured k=5 run that scored pass^5=1.0 (60/60): the floor sits deliberately below the point estimate so one flaky trial does not fail the gate, while a real 2+-task regression does. Unmeasured models stay at 0 until their first live run. claude-opus-4-8 also carries a pinnedArtifact (generatedAt + sha256 of the committed run's raw bytes): the gate verifies the selected artifact hashes to the pin, so a deleted-newest rollback or an edited/replaced artifact fails closed. Re-pin deliberately when a new measurement lands.
